message:
fix(tui): pass actual status string to StatusBadge for correct coloring

StatusBadge was using the badge display label (e.g., "PROG", "BLKD") to
look up status colors via status_fg/status_bg.  After to_ascii_lowercase,
"prog" and "blkd" don't match any status — only "OPEN" happened to work
because lowercased "open" matches.  All other statuses silently fell
through to the dim default color.

Fix by storing the original issue status string in the StatusBadge
variant and using it for color resolution.  Remove Copy from
ScanSegmentKind (String is not Copy).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
